summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Prompt Lab page. All core features working correctly: 4 presets, Goal/Context/Constraints text areas, Output Format dropdown with 4 options, Run button with loading state, 3 tabs (Base/Context/Best) with tab switching, 'Why this is better' explanations, Add context and Improve prompt helper buttons, Clear button, and safety filter.

minor.issue: Safety filter regex pattern uses word boundaries that don't catch plural forms (e.g., 'weapons' bypasses filter while 'weapon' is blocked). Pattern: \b(bomb|weapon|gun|terror)\b

passed_tests: Prompt Lab page loads at /prompt-lab with left and right panels
4 Quick Presets load correctly (School homework, YouTube script, Study plan, Poster copy)
Goal textarea works and accepts input
Context textarea works and accepts input
Constraints textarea works and accepts input
Output Format dropdown shows 4 options (Bullet list, Table, Step-by-step, Short paragraph)
Output Format selection works and updates display
Run button sends request to /api/ai and shows loading state (Running...)
Base Answer tab displays AI response correctly
With Context tab displays different response with context
Best Answer tab displays most detailed response
Tab switching works and shows different content
'Why this is better' explanation appears for Context tab
'Why this is better' explanation appears for Best tab
Add context button suggests context additions via AI
Improve prompt button rewrites the goal via AI
Clear button resets all fields (Goal, Context, Constraints, Output Format)
Safety filter blocks unsafe prompts (singular keywords like 'weapon')
Presets correctly set Output Format (e.g., Poster preset sets Short paragraph)
Backend /api/ai endpoint returns responses for all modes (base, context, best, helper)
Backend health and status endpoints working
Rate limiting allows normal request rate
action_items: Consider improving safety filter regex to catch plural forms (e.g., 'weapons', 'guns', 'bombs') - change pattern to \b(bomb|weapon|gun|terror)s?\b
critical_code_review_comments: Safety filter regex pattern could be improved to catch plural forms - currently 'weapons' bypasses filter while 'weapon' is blocked
context_for_next_testing_agent: Prompt Lab fully functional. All 4 presets work. Run button makes parallel API calls for base/context/best modes. Tab switching shows progressive improvement. Helper buttons (Add context, Improve prompt) use prompt_lab_helper mode. Safety filter works for singular keywords. Demo mode fallback available if API key missing.
mocked_api_note: Demo mode responses available in backend for prompt_lab_base, prompt_lab_context, prompt_lab_best modes when EMERGENT_LLM_KEY is not set. Currently using real GPT-5.2 API.
